message:
fix: resolve symlink mismatch in doctor worktree JSONL and Dolt DB path in syncbranch tests (bd-2a5i3)

Doctor sync-branch JSONL resolution failed on macOS because git rev-parse
resolves /tmp to /private/tmp but Go paths do not, causing filepath.Rel to
produce .. paths that get rejected. Fix by resolving symlinks before
computing relative paths.

Syncbranch TestGetConfigFromDB created Dolt DB at .beads/beads.db but
factory opens at .beads/dolt/ (canonical Dolt path). Fix test to use
correct path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -479,7 +479,7 @@ func TestGetConfigFromDB(t *testing.T) {
 		beadsDir := setupTestBeadsDir(t)
 		ctx := context.Background()
 
-		// Use "dolt" as the DB directory (matches configfile.DatabasePath() for Dolt backends)
+		// Dolt backend always uses .beads/dolt/ as DB directory (configfile.DatabasePath)
 		store, err := dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: filepath.Join(beadsDir, "dolt")})
 		if err != nil {
 			t.Fatalf("Failed to create test database: %v", err)
@@ -496,7 +496,7 @@ func TestGetConfigFromDB(t *testing.T) {
 		beadsDir := setupTestBeadsDir(t)
 		ctx := context.Background()
 
-		// Use "dolt" as the DB directory (matches configfile.DatabasePath() for Dolt backends)
+		// Dolt backend always uses .beads/dolt/ as DB directory (configfile.DatabasePath)
 		dbPath := filepath.Join(beadsDir, "dolt")
 		store, err := dolt.New(ctx, &dolt.Config{Path: dbPath})
 		if err != nil {
